series_metadata.series_description: The Trust department analyzes the mutual fund documents and current holdings list for the mutual fund investments held in the state treasury investment accounts. The mutual fund documents are obtained and analyzed, when revised or updated, and the holdings list is obtained and analyzed monthly. Included in this record series is a checklist document completed by the Trust department while evaluating the aforementioned mutual fund documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain data until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Paper: Retain data until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
